title: Earthly Rice Vermicelli
description: An earthy and silky German dish featuring rice vermicelli, cooked and grilled to perfection, suitable for a crowd-pleasing dinner or snack option that is also fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: Rice vermicelli
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free rice vermicelli if needed.

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Boil the rice vermicelli according to package instructions until al dente, then drain well. Rinse with cold water if preferred for a lighter texture.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and add salt. Add drained rice vermicelli and toss to coat evenly.
Transfer the vermicelli to your preheated grill and cook for about 1 minute per side or until golden brown and slightly crispy.
While the vermicelli grills, slice your vegetables into thin strips if not already done. Season them with a bit of olive oil, salt, and herbs (optional).
Arrange grilled vegetables on plates and top each serving with cooked rice vermicelli.
